title: PPE Kit Detection System
description: An AI-based system that detects PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) such as helmets and vests using YOLOv8 and OpenCV to ensure workplace safety.

title: AI Content Generator
description: AI-driven content generation platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. Uses LLM APIs to generate blog posts, social media content, and marketing copy.

title: AI-powered Resume Analyzer
description: An AI-powered tool that analyzes resumes, extracts key information, and evaluates candidates based on skill relevance using NLP and Machine Learning.

title: Book Recommender System
description: A book recommendation system built using machine learning techniques to suggest books based on user interests and reading patterns.

title: AI Mock Interview
description: AI-powered mock interview platform that simulates real interview scenarios, provides feedback on answers, and helps improve interview skills.

title: Weather App
description: A weather forecast app that displays real-time temperature, humidity, and conditions using API integration with a clean, minimalist UI.

title: AI Blog Content Assistant
description: AI blog generator powered by LangChain and HuggingFace that creates high-quality blog content with customizable tone and style.

title: Job Role Prediction
description: Machine learning-based web app that predicts suitable job roles based on user skills, education, and experience using trained ML models.

title: Password Generator
description: A secure password generator that creates strong, random passwords with user-defined parameters for length and complexity.
